description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. The barrel is long and features vented ribbing along the top, suggesting enhanced heat dissipation and accuracy. The cylinder and frame are metallic, with a visible rotating drum, indicating a revolver-style shotgun mechanism. The grip is ergonomic, contoured, and appears to be made of a textured polymer for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, with a reinforced lower edge and finger grooves for added control. Overall, the shotgun has a sleek, aggressive appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, black tactical shotgun with a long vented barrel, revolver-style cylinder, and ergonomic polymer grip. The design is robust and angular, with a prominent trigger guard and sleek finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and vented barrel ribbing, with the grip and frame aligned behind.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the long barrel, vented ribbing, metallic cylinder, and ergonomic grip with finger grooves.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip, the top of the frame, and the alignment of the barrel and cylinder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, including the long barrel, cylinder, and contoured grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Single long barrel with vented ribbing along the top; no visible double-barrel configuration.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, elongated trigger guard with reinforced lower edge and visible finger grooves.
